title: Borders
overview: The Imperial Church comes in search of "Murasame" the demon blade that contains "life" which Shino possesses.

title: Humans and Demons
overview: Shino and Sousuke travels to the city to find Hamaji.

title: The Approaching Demon
overview: Shino and Sosuke are reunited safely with Hamaji at the Villa. Shino tells Sosuke that they were saved by Satomi Rio five years ago.

title: Homecoming
overview: The demon appearing in the middle of town chasing after Shino wanting to eat him and the monks that hunt demons chasing after.

title: Divine Blesings
overview: Due to the new moon, Sosuke sleeps for an abnormally long time while Murasame becomes strangely quiet.

title: Stashed
overview: Shino shows interest in a incedent that was reported in the newspaper.

title: A Promise
overview: The villagers have discovered the gold the monkey god gave Shino and has forced him and his friends to take them up the mountain.

title: Encounter
overview: On the train ride home Shino meets an old friend to the surprise of Sosuke.

title: Guard
overview: Hamaji is moving to an all-girls school dorm.

title: A Lonely Figure
overview: A man that resembles Sosuke has been spotted in the Imperial Capital; this has Keno up in racing around the city to exact his revenge.

title: True Self
overview: Murasame starts going crazy from blood loss after Shino is shot in the neck. Shino then reverts back to his supposed 18 year old self.

title: Compensation
overview: Kohaku returns to her abode, and seemingly "devours" her friend.

title: Karma
overview: The Church is forcing Satomi to bring Shino before the Elders. To make matters worse, the man that looks like Sosuke shared with Shino some devastating secrets.

title: Doll
overview: Shino, Sosuke, and Genpachi go to the Imamura doll maker to pick up a set of dolls for the elite church member's order.

title: Molding
overview: Shino confronts Nachi about the magical barrier around Daikaku's house. Meanwhile, the young boy runs off and Shino chases after him.

title: Reverse Flow
overview: Shino is forced to teach children how to read and write at the church, where he is shunned by most of the children.

title: Ignorance
overview: The "other" Sousuke asks a black haired girl, "Do you want me to set you free?" Meanwhile, Satomi is discussing a new rumor of corpses suddenly appearing out of nowhere.

title: In Homage
overview: Sousuke and the "other" Sousuke, Ao, fight, with Shino desperately trying to stop them.

title: Reminiscence
overview: Nachi's black panther decides to leave the house, feeling that it is too crowded. Shino goes and finds him with Genpachi.

title: Chance Encounters
overview: Dousetsu comes to the capital in search of his sister. He meets Shino in the Konaya inn.

title: Spirited Away
overview: Shino is sent to a place called Ikura to investigate a case of Kamikakushi by Satomi, saying that the child came back in the same age as he was when he was spirited away.

title: Encompassing Heavens
overview: Shinobu is taken away by the Tengu which live in the mountains. Shino and Sousuke follow him, only to be stopped by Ao, who tells Shino that the princess will be revived in a short time and that Shino will never be able to collect all the beads before that.

title: Twin Moons
overview: Shinobu awakens to his Tengu lineage as Ao threatens Hazuki. Shino and Sosuke finally gathers all 8 bead holders, while something is starting to affect Sosuke.

title: Crossroads
overview: Shinobu arrives at the Konna-ya, gathering all eight bead holders, but still missing Sosuke's Bead of Duty. Meanwhile, Keno and Rio inform Shino of Sosuke's condition, caused by his Bead of Duty seemingly choosing Ao as its rightful holder.

title: Pursuit
overview: As Sosuke's condition worsens, Shino and the others head for the Old Church after learning of Ao's business there. To their shock, they discover that Tamazusa was already waiting for them.

title: Destiny
overview: Ao makes an attempt to take Shino away so the Ritual would not happen betraying Tamazusa. Due to Shino's strong wishes, Sosuke wakes up from his comatose state therefore stopping the Ritual.
